name: playwright-openai-plugin
description: Installable Codex plugin and local CLI for operating an already logged-in OpenAI/ChatGPT browser session through Playwright.

interface.shortDescription: Control a logged-in ChatGPT browser session from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installable Codex plugin for the playwright-openai CLI. It helps Codex inspect, submit, wait, collect, revise, and diagnose ChatGPT web workflows through an already logged-in managed browser session without storing browser credentials. It also includes a GPT Image prompt-router skill backed by an attributed offline prompt catalogue.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my current ChatGPT browser session.
Generate an image and collect the result.
Find a GPT Image 2 prompt pattern for an image idea.
Check whether an image job can wait, collect, or revise.
